core_payload.content:
# Symphony Observability

## 1. Role
Symphony Observability will become the evidence layer that explains orchestration with enough depth for operators and agents to understand who asked for work, what lane ran it, what it cost, what degraded, and what needs intervention next.

## 2. Future Observability Contract
The system will expose assignment-aware status views, cost and rate attribution, cross-client activity filters, and clearer projection of failures, recovery paths, and review requests into operator and control-plane surfaces.

## 3. Operational Consequence
A trustworthy issue runner will explain not only what ran, but on whose behalf it ran, under which economic posture, and with what next-step obligations. Observability will therefore become a first-class orchestration contract rather than an afterthought dashboard.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Symphony Observability supports To Dig Deep by turning runtime behavior into accountable evidence instead of opaque automation.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Symphony Observability defines the future evidence layer for orchestration: assignment-aware status views, clearer cost and lane attribution, cross-client activity filters, and stronger projection of failures, degraded modes, and review requests into operator surfaces.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
